zh.Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire,: 英國越可爾吉文代爾 在 格亞特 吉文代爾
zh.Dunster, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.Lechlade, Gloucester, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯
zh.Grimthorpe, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolanda Mohun於1166年6月6日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親William de Mohun37歲，母親Goda de Toni24歲。她於1186年與Ralph Fitz William在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維利晨結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1252年4月29日在英國格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolanda Mohun于1166年6月6日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲William de Mohun37岁，母亲Goda de Toni24岁。她于1186年与Ralph Fitz William在英国英格兰薩默塞特維利晨结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1252年4月29日在英国格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Yolanda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolanda Mohun was born on 6 June 1166, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Mohun, was 37 and her mother, Goda de Toni, was 24. She married Ralph Fitz William in 1186, in Williton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 29 April 1252, in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 85.

fr.Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire,: Givendale in Great Givendale, Everwyck, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolanda Mohun est née le 6 juin 1166, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Mohun, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Goda de Toni, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Fitz William en 1186, à Williton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 avril 1252, à Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolanda Mohun am 6. Juni 1166 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Mohun 37 und ihre Mutter Goda de Toni 24. Sie hat 1186 in Williton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Ralph Fitz William geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. April 1252 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolanda Mohun è nata il il 6 giugno 1166 nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Mohun, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Goda de Toni, aveva 24 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Yolanda Mohunが1166年6月6日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父William de Mohunは37歳，母Goda de Toniは24歳であった。1186年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィリトンでRalph Fitz Williamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1252年4月29日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスで85歳で死去した。

ko.Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire,: 영국 요르크실르 지븐데일 인 그리트 지븐데일
ko.lifeSummary: Yolanda Mohun(이)가 1166년 6월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Mohun(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Goda de Toni(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1186년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 윌리턴에서 Ralph Fitz William(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 4월 29일 영국 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolanda Mohun nasceu em 6 de junho de 1166, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Mohun, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Goda de Toni, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Fitz William em 1186, em Williton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de abril de 1252, em Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 85 anos.

ru.Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire,: гивендеил ин грит гивендеил, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolanda Mohun родилась 6 июня 1166 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Mohun было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Goda de Toni, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Fitz William в 1186 г. в местности уиллитон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 апреля 1252 г. в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет.
